speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Thanks Sam! Now let's check in on how our markets are tracking, and despite all the global uncertainty, there's actually some good news to report. <cite index='25-9'>Australia's S&P/ASX 200 was up 0.53% today</cite>, showing that our market's holding its own pretty well despite the challenges elsewhere.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] That's really encouraging to hear, Alex! And you know what's fantastic? <cite index='26-9,26-10,26-11'>Community sport participation has rebounded strongly across the country, with over 11 million Australians now actively involved in organised sporting activities, thanks to successful local initiatives like 'Sport for All' that are increasing participation among diverse communities</cite>.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Too right! And with <cite index='26-11'>the upcoming Brisbane 2032 Olympics already sparking increased investment in grassroots sports infrastructure throughout Queensland and beyond</cite>, there's never been a better time to get involved in sport.
